steps.t: The wood for the Mead-hall fire pits are kept along the wall to Reeve Gárwig's left. Gárwig has requested a log be put on the fire. It seems to be har…
Gárwig asked for the log be put on the fire-pit to his left. Gárwig has requested a log be put on the fire. It seems to be harder and harder to keep t…
Gárwig awaits his fate on the throne in the Mead-hall.
The messenger which Gárwig asked you to send to Dunfast is waiting near the stables in Forlaw.
Cyneberg is keeping Gárwig company in Lornsettle, the Mead-hall of Forlaw.
